original text:
#CarerConversations toolkit available involved Carers 2018.
Carers national celebration unpaid carers' contribution communities. 33,000 people friend, relative neighbour illness, disability borough Croydon alone.
Organisations, individuals, businesses community groups download resources, including posters, pledges, flyers Facebook Twitter graphics start #CarerConversations Croydon.
useful guidance national Carers website.
information about Carers Carers Support Centre #CarerConversations, email Communications Officer
